nodes.label: AI as professional polish tool
nodes.grounding_span: AI can 'polish' my response by using words or phrases that mean the same thing but sound less colloquial

nodes.label: AI as speed tool for discrete tasks
nodes.label_negative: Human slower but more thorough for routine tasks
nodes.grounding_span: AI thinks much more quickly than I do

nodes.label: AI accuracy in numerical tasks
nodes.label_negative: AI risk of missing critical details
nodes.grounding_span: I worry that it might get some details wrong

nodes.label: AI as verification-requiring tool
nodes.label_negative: AI as fully autonomous task completer
nodes.grounding_span: when I use it, it's in collaboration with me also carrying out elements to make sure that everything is 100% accurate

nodes.label: AI adoption in workplace
nodes.label_negative: Workplace AI reluctance due to limited exposure
nodes.grounding_span: As I carry out admin tasks there is more scope for me to use AI, but my other admin colleagues are more reluctant

nodes.label: AI for simple customer issues
nodes.label_negative: AI using generic information missing customer-specific framing
nodes.grounding_span: the AI invoice had just used the standard information, whereas if I had generated it myself, I would have tailored it to the customers expectations

nodes.label: Professional competence and client satisfaction
nodes.grounding_span: we want to avoid this kind of situation as it could lead to us losing customers

nodes.label: Efficiency and time savings
nodes.grounding_span: often I need to send the response quickly so I can get on with other things

nodes.label: Accuracy and reliability in work
nodes.grounding_span: the customer requires the invoice to be 100% accurate

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for email drafting
nodes.grounding_span: I will use AI to help me format this

nodes.label: Frustration with AI invoice error
nodes.grounding_span: This was frustrating, because the customer had received what they had asked for, but the AI invoice had just used the standard information

nodes.label: Fear of industry obsolescence
nodes.grounding_span: I do worry sometimes that roles like mine could be made obsolete by AI

nodes.label: Optimistic continued use for proven tasks
nodes.grounding_span: I think I will continue to use it for the tasks we know it can do well

nodes.label: Experience-driven calibration of trust
nodes.grounding_span: I always want to check it for accuracy meaning it does not save me the amount of time I need it to

nodes.label: Domain-based boundary setting — clear separation of AI-appropriate vs. human-only tasks
nodes.grounding_span: some elements such as invoicing will remain a person specific activity to ensure accuracy
